Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase superfamily. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=4'-demethylrebeccamycin + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = rebeccamycin + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:27353, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:135511, ChEBI:CHEBI:595389; EC=2.1.1.164; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:18502766};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Glycosyl O-methyltransferase that catalyzes the final step in the biosynthesis of rebeccamycin, an indolocarbazole alkaloid that inhibits topoisomerase 1. Has broad substrate specificity and functions as glycosyl O-methyltransferase on a number of rebeccamycin analogs. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:16575939, ECO:0000269|PubMed:18502766}.
